cedict_en: variant of 草[cao3] | grass/straw/manuscript/draft (of a document)/careless/rough/CL:棵[ke1],撮[zuo3],株[zhu1],根[gen1] | variant of 肏[cao4]
to pile on top of one another/layer; stratum/floor (of a building); story/(math.) sheaf/classifier for layers
to appear/to arise/to emerge/to show up

apart from; besides; in addition to (used to exclude, as in 除了他，誰也沒來|除了他，谁也没来[chu2 le5 ta1 , shei2 ye3 mei2 lai2] "apart from him, nobody came", or to include, as in 除了英語，他也會法語|除了英语，他也会法语[chu2 le5 Ying1 yu3 , ta1 ye3 hui4 Fa3 yu3] "in addition to English, he also knows French")/(used to introduce one of two habitual alternatives in the pattern 除了[chu2 le5] + A + 就是[jiu4 shi4] + B, "either A or B")
old variant of 春[chun1] | surname Chun | spring (season)/gay/joyful/youthful/love/lust/life
word (general term including monosyllables through to short phrases)/term (e.g. technical term)/expression
intelligent; clever; bright/acute (of sight and hearing)
